files_modified.change_summary: Added post_stage_comment helper function that posts structured GitHub issue comments after each pipeline stage (triager, engineer, test-writer, security-gate, code-reviewer, pr-assembler) with agent name, status (success/failure), and summary. Updated gate_check to also post a failure comment for the specific stage. Added post_stage_comment calls after every agent invocation and gate check, including in error paths.
Added instruction requiring the triager to include a 'stage_summary' field in its JSON output containing a brief human-readable completion summary suitable for posting as an issue comment.
Added instruction requiring the engineer to include a 'stage_summary' field in its JSON output containing a brief human-readable completion summary suitable for posting as an issue comment.
Added instruction requiring the test writer to include a 'stage_summary' field in its JSON output containing a brief human-readable completion summary suitable for posting as an issue comment.
Added instruction requiring the code reviewer to include a 'stage_summary' field in its JSON output containing a brief human-readable completion summary suitable for posting as an issue comment.
Added instruction requiring the security gate to include a 'stage_summary' field in its JSON output containing a brief human-readable completion summary suitable for posting as an issue comment.
Added instruction requiring the PR assembler to include a 'stage_summary' field in its JSON output containing a brief human-readable completion summary suitable for posting as an issue comment.
